title: rubus abietum
intro: Rubus abietum, also known as the pine raspberry or pine raspberry bush, is a type of bramble plant that belongs to the rose family. The medicinal properties of Rubus abietum include its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant properties. Rubus abietum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
